name: Phantom
short_description: This game features a vivid cartoon style with a piglet wielding a gun as the protagonist.
detailed_description: This game features a vivid cartoon style with a piglet wielding a gun as the protagonist. Players control the pig's movements with the ASDW keys and use the space bar to make it jump over obstacles. The left mouse button serves as the attack button, enabling the pig to defeat various monsters blocking its path. The background music is lively and upbeat, perfectly matching the overall tone of the game. A crisp sound effect accompanies each jump, adding to the fun. Along the way, players can collect sun-shaped coins that can be used to purchase items or unlock new content. The game allows players to utilize terrain features for higher and farther jumps. The pig's health bar is displayed in the top-left corner of the screen, and players can replenish health or gain extra time by collecting items throughout the journey.
